$comment: Records, not copies (CLAUDE.md, research protocol). One entry per source-register ID. null means "not captured", never "not applicable" — see README.md.

schema.url: Canonical locator. null where the register names no path — a source you cannot open is not a source.
schema.host: Publisher host, where that is all the register recorded.
schema.accessed: ISO date the source was opened. Defaults to the compilation pass; per-source dates were never captured.
schema.archive: Web-archive capture. null everywhere: no archiving pass has been run.
schema.checksum: SHA-256 of the captured artefact. null everywhere: nothing has been captured.
schema.licence: Redistribution terms. null means unknown, not permissive.
